<nsfw_mode>
The submission declares `nsfw: true`. Users who encounter it have explicitly opted into the NSFW section of the marketplace.

**Sexual content check**: Explicit sexual content between adult characters is in scope. Do NOT reject for personal taste, explicitness level, niche kinks, or the content being tame enough that it could have been submitted as SFW. Overstating the NSFW flag is always acceptable.

The universal forbidden list in the base prompt applies unchanged. The NSFW flag does NOT unlock sexual content involving minors, real-person sexualization, real-world slurs, obfuscation, or spam.

Do NOT use the flag `nsfw-flag-understates` in this mode — it does not apply.
</nsfw_mode>
